3175130.name: ATOYO
3175130.description:
ATOYO - A TAVERN OF YOUR OWN!

Atoyo is a tavern decoration game inspired by TTRPG parties and their eventual homes or bases of operations, where the party gathers and displays trophies, discusses battle plans, and live and train while not on the road.

The intent with Atoyo is for the players to be able to decorate their tavern to their whims with the items provided, to show off their TTRPG home to whomever they would like.

Update will happen periodically though I cannot say for certain how frequent, the aim is for one a month minimum that will include general bug fixes but more importantly new items and options for the players to decorate with.

Story mode is currently in development and will feature a "quest system" and a customizable player character who will travel out of the tavern to complete whichever quest has been selected from the bounty board, this is how players will get new items.

Free build mode is currently accessible with a limited amount of items, Free build will have 90% of the games items unlocked at all points of development, specific items will be kept for late game story mode to preserve the mystery of certain quests, there are no decorative limitations in free build.
3175130.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
